/local/scratch/yw737/cheri_poison/output/sdk/bin/clang -O0 -target riscv64-unknown-freebsd -march=rv64gcxcheri -mabi=l64pc128d -mno-relax --sysroot=/local/scratch/yw737/cheri_poison/output/sdk/sysroot-riscv64-purecap -fuse-ld=lld "CMakeFiles/CWE415_Double_Free__malloc_free_char_54-good.dir/s01/CWE415_Double_Free__malloc_free_char_54a.c.o" "CMakeFiles/CWE415_Double_Free__malloc_free_char_54-good.dir/s01/CWE415_Double_Free__malloc_free_char_54b.c.o" "CMakeFiles/CWE415_Double_Free__malloc_free_char_54-good.dir/s01/CWE415_Double_Free__malloc_free_char_54c.c.o" "CMakeFiles/CWE415_Double_Free__malloc_free_char_54-good.dir/s01/CWE415_Double_Free__malloc_free_char_54d.c.o" "CMakeFiles/CWE415_Double_Free__malloc_free_char_54-good.dir/s01/CWE415_Double_Free__malloc_free_char_54e.c.o" -o /local/scratch/yw737/cheri_poison/juliet-test-suite-c/bin/CWE415/good/CWE415_Double_Free__malloc_free_char_54-good  /local/scratch/yw737/cheri_poison/juliet-test-suite-c/bin/support/libsupport.a -lpthread -lm
